description: Open the sample scene 'dwanko_run.tnz' in OpenToonz. This scene currently has a wide-shot camera setup. Your goal is to set up a second camera for a close-up shot of the character (head and torso filling most of the frame) without modifying the original camera. Save the scene as '/home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/multi_camera.tnz'. Configure the output settings to use the new camera and render Frame 1 as a PNG to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/outputs/closeup.png'.
